prospects.name: Julian Flanagan
prospects.notes: Berkeley Biophysics PhD student, age 21. Zillow application approved 04/12. Lease signed. Term: Aug 1 2026–Jul 31 2027, $1,650/mo, $1,650 deposit. Room A (King) filled. **04/17: Venmo payment received — $3,300 (1st month + deposit). Fully committed.**

prospects.name: Isabella
prospects.notes: Incoming UC Berkeley Civil & Environmental Engineering masters student, Aug move-in, lives ~1hr from Berkeley. Very friendly, polite, clean, responsible. Willing to meet housemates. Tour with Fabio: Sat 5/2 after 1 PM — COMPLETED. **05/01 (eve):** Reminder sent — "Just a quick reminder that your tour at 2322 Stuart St is tomorrow (Saturday, May 2) after 1 PM with Fabio." **05/04 (morning):** Post-tour check-in sent — "Hi Isabella! Hope you had a great visit on Saturday just checking in to see how you felt about the place. Would love to hear your thoughts, and happy to answer any questions you have." No reply yet as of 05/04 evening. Thread warm — await decision.

prospects.name: Om
prospects.notes: Messaged "Hi, is this available?" Wed 04/29 via FB Marketplace. Replied "Yes, are you interested?" No response after 6 days (as of 05/04 weekly audit). Archived per 5-day stale rule. FB Messenger blocked from automated access.

prospects.name: Eliza
prospects.notes: Passed on 04/29 after touring 04/22. Texted: "I will pass on the room, thank you for letting me come by to see it!"

prospects.name: Jacquy
prospects.notes: Messaged 07:25 AM. Morning sweep replied 08:17 with room details. 5 days no reply. Archived 04/22 morning sweep per 5-day stale rule.

prospects.name: Taranjot
prospects.notes: Messaged 07:06 AM. Morning sweep replied 08:17. Taranjot replied "Hey yes! Can we schedule a tour." Midday: sent screening questions + tour offer. **04/17 evening (12:50 PM):** Taranjot replied "Oh dang I'm trying to move in a week or two 😟" — DISQUALIFIED: immediate move-in vs. Aug 1 lease. Evening sweep sent polite decline. Closed.

prospects.name: Niokhor Dione
prospects.notes: New Zillow lead. Replied 04/12, then 5 days silence. Archived 04/17. **04/18 evening:** Niokhor replied via Zillow: "Hi Mike, unfortunately I'm looking for something immediately and would not be able to commit for a year." — SELF-DISQUALIFIED: immediate move-in + no year commitment. Evening sweep sent gracious close. Closed.

prospects.name: J T
prospects.notes: UC Berkeley graduate student. Replied 04/12. 6 days no response. Archived 04/18 morning sweep. STRONG fit — worth re-engaging via SpareRoom if Mike logs in.

prospects.notes: Replied 04/12. 6 days no response. Archived 04/18 morning sweep.

prospects.name: Kris
prospects.notes: Couple (ages 20, 18). Replied 04/12. 6 days no response. Archived 04/18 morning sweep. Couple may not fit single-room format regardless.

prospects.notes: Senior scientist at Lawrence Berkeley Lab (staff scientist). French, age 55. Seeking shared house for 1 year (wife joins Aug 2027). REPLIED 04/06 12:36 AM via Yahoo Mail to CL relay. No response after 6 days. Phone: 510-365-5300. Archived by evening sweep 04/12 per >5-day stale rule. EXCELLENT fit if re-engages — Mike can nudge via direct text.
prospects.actionNeeded: Reply with screening confirmation and tour scheduling. Thomas is an excellent prospect — LBL staff scientist = very stable income, quiet/respectful, seeking 1-year lease. Suggest Friday evening tour if Mike is back in Berkeley.

prospects.notes: Postdoc at UC Berkeley. REPLIED 04/08 clarifying room details. 5+ days no reply — archived 04/13 morning sweep. Phone: 217-904-8944. Worth a direct text nudge if Mike wants to re-engage.

prospects.name: Julius
prospects.notes: Berkeley PhD student. Shared bathroom dealbreaker — replied 04/15 that bathroom is shared, Julius went silent (2+ days). Archived 04/17 morning sweep. Phone: 510-859-5718.

Polite decline sent 04/15. Neel replied 04/15 04:13 "I worries thanks" (acknowledging decline). Closed.

prospects.name: Jolly
prospects.notes: FB Marketplace inquiry. Mike replied "Yes." 6 days no reply. No screening info collected. Archived 04/16 morning sweep per stale rule.

prospects.name: Kristine (Kristin)
prospects.notes: FB Marketplace inquiry. Mike replied "Yes, are you interested?" 7+ days no reply. "You can now rate each other" auto-msg. Dead lead. Archived 04/16 morning sweep.

prospects.name: Yonathan Arteaga
prospects.notes: Asked "Hello, is this still available?" Replied 04/15 midday with lease terms ($1,650/mo, 12-month lease Aug 1), screening questions, tour offer. 5 days no reply. Archived 04/20 morning sweep per 5-day stale rule.

prospects.name: Liam
prospects.notes: PA at Highland Hospital Oakland (10 yrs), cyclist/reader/writer. Has 5yo Australian Shepherd "Kota." Phone: 951-213-1749. Tour attempted 04/16 noon but Liam was tied up. **04/16:** Liam "will swing by next week." **04/18:** Active iMessage convo with Mike. Mike confirmed pet policy: allowed if house-trained + well-behaved, $250 deposit for deep clean. Liam confirmed "That's perfect thanks." **04/18 (2:21 PM PT):** Mike asked move-in date. Liam replied "May 15ish, flexible." Mike clarified: soonest current tenant moves out is beginning of July. **04/19:** Liam "Ok I might be able to make that work." Thread warm. 🐾 Pet: Australian Shepherd — $250 deposit confirmed. **04/22:** Thu 4/23 Fast Track Swing conflict. Morning sweep drafted reschedule. Liam confirmed can't make Thu, Mike asked about 4/23 but Liam said "won't be in city until the evening." Mike offered contractor/handyman to show him the place instead. **04/27 ~11:35 AM PT:** Sent warm close: "Hey Liam totally understand things have been hectic. The room's still here if the timing ever lines up for you. Feel free to reach back out anytime." **04/27 ~11:49 AM PT:** Liam replied — "Hey Mike, apologies for not getting back to you sooner. A few things fell through with a job I was hoping to get so I'm currently delayed in my plans. I'll get back to you soon. LK" **04/27 ~12:12 PM PT:** Mike replied warmly — "No worries at all, Liam sorry to hear about the job situation. The room's available August 1 so there's still time on your side. Whenever your plans firm back up, just reach out and we'll get you in to see it. Hope things look up soon!" **04/27 ~12:45 PM PT:** Liam replied "Thanks for the heads up." — Thread fully resolved for now. Self-pacing, will reach back out when ready. No action needed. Move-in target: July/Aug 1 (Mike to decide if July OK).

prospects.name: 湘宜
prospects.notes: Previous response sent with tour offer. Replied "Sorry I'm looking to start in mid June." DISQUALIFIED: June start doesn't match Aug 1 lease. Polite decline sent 04/15 midday.

prospects.name: Morgan
prospects.notes: Asked "when is the move in date and what are the other roommates like." Follow-up sent 04/15 with full details + screening questions. 5 days no reply. Archived 04/20 morning sweep per 5-day stale rule.

prospects.name: Martin Kim
prospects.notes: NEW 04/16. 21yo medical assistant working full-time 8-5 in Walnut Creek/Vallejo. Quiet, looking for a place to sleep. Replied 04/16–17 with details. Asked about May move-in. **04/17 midday:** Told Aug 1 is fixed. **04/17 evening (3:25 PM EDT):** Martin replied "I see, it probably isn't a good fit for me. Thank you nonetheless and I wish you the best of luck with your search. —Martin" — Self-declined. Evening sweep sent gracious close. Closed.

prospects.name: Unknown (Zillow)
prospects.notes: New Zillow lead. 2/2 screening match. Monthly income $8,333, credit 720-799, no cats/dogs (has "Other" pet), 1 occupant, 1 bedroom, parking needed, 12-month lease desired. ⚠️ Ideal move-in 06/01/2026 (doesn't match Aug 1). Application invite sent 04/15. **04/17 evening sweep (6:07 PM):** Sent clarification — Aug 1 is fixed, can't accommodate June 1, offered to move forward if Aug 1 works. **04/25 midday sweep:** 8 days no response. Archived per 5-day stale rule.

prospects.name: Krishna
prospects.notes: Added by morning sweep 04/19. Said she'd wait until Sunday (Mike back in town). Morning sweep sent follow-up 08:20 AM: "Hi Krishna! Just wanted to follow up — I'm back in town now. Would you still like to come see the room? Happy to set up a time this week. Feel free to text me at (714) 612-0723 for faster coordination!" No reply after 5 days — archived 04/24 morning sweep per 5-day stale rule.

prospects.name: Arman John
prospects.notes: Inquired Apr 9. Mike replied "No sorry. Only 12 month leases." Self-disqualified/declined — wanted non-12-month. Added to tracker 04/21 morning sweep.

prospects.name: Yashitha
prospects.notes: Asked about May 1 move-in. Told Aug 1 is earliest. **04/20 (6:29 PM):** Replied "Sure thanks but my move in is may. So this won't work but thanks for checking in." Self-disqualified: May move-in vs. Aug 1 lease. Closing reply sent; she liked it 7:18 PM. Thread fully resolved.

prospects.name: Kevin
prospects.notes: NEW 04/16 11:46 AM PT. Tech worker relocating to Bay Area, hybrid schedule, active lifestyle, clean/respectful. Wants move-in May 11–15. DISQUALIFIED: May timing doesn't match Aug 1 lease start. Polite decline sent 04/16 12:09 PT via FB Messenger (offered re-engagement if Aug 1 works). Closed.

completed.outcome: RESCHEDULING — Tour did NOT happen at 11am. Julian messaged ready at 10:16 AM PT; Mike replied 11:27 AM PT asking Julian to text 714-612-0723 to do FaceTime/Zoom later today. Julian saw message. Pending reschedule for later today 04/12.
CANCELLED — Mike's flight delayed. Rescheduling attempted via iMessage but stalled since 04/10. Julius available mornings before work, in town through Wed. Mike: nudge to reschedule.
